subcodes.first_line: O My handmaiden! O companion of this Day! The world of existence hath been perfumed by the fragrances of Divine revelation and illumined by the rays of the Orb of manifestation [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امتی یا صاحب امروز از نفحات وحی الهی عالم وجود معطر و از انوار نیر ظهور
subcodes.subjects: @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @chastity and purity, @Hands of the Cause, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
